# Childs Real Estate

> Childs Real Estate are Utah's premier listing agents. Ammon and Tasha Childs help homeowners sell faster and for more — with expert pricing, aggressive marketing, and deep local market knowledge throughout Utah County and the Salt Lake Valley.

## Business Information

- Business Name: Childs Real Estate
- Brokerage: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Elite Real Estate
- Address: 825 E 1180 S Ste 300, American Fork, UT 84003
- Phone: (801) 735-8460
- Email: ammon@childsrealestateutah.com
- Website: https://www.childsrealestateutah.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/childsrealestateutah
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/childsrealestateutah

## Team

- Ammon Childs — Broker / Owner. Over 15 years of Utah real estate experience. Phone: (801) 735-8460. Email: ammon@childsrealestateutah.com
- Tasha Childs — Realtor / Co-Owner. Specializes in helping families throughout Utah County. Phone: (801) 602-8856. Email: tasha@childsrealestateutah.com

## Smart Seller Programs (Listing Packages)

Childs Real Estate offers transparent, flat-rate listing fees with no surprises at closing.

- [Gold Program](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/packages): 1% listing fee. Includes professional photography, MLS listing, yard sign, open house, online marketing, and full agent representation.
- [Diamond Program](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/packages): 1.99% listing fee. Everything in Gold plus drone photography and a dedicated showing agent.
- [Platinum Program](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/packages): 2.49% listing fee. Full-service, top-tier marketing package with maximum exposure and white-glove service.

## Areas Served

Utah County and Salt Lake Valley, including: American Fork, Alpine, Cedar Hills, Highland, Lehi, Orem, Provo, Pleasant Grove, Lindon, Eagle Mountain, Saratoga Springs, Draper, Sandy, Salt Lake City, Spanish Fork, Springville, Mapleton.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com): Overview of services, market stats, and seller value proposition.
- [Sell Your Home](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/sell): Seller resources, process overview, and free home valuation.
- [Buy a Home](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/buyers): Buyer resources and property search.
- [Listing Packages](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/packages): Detailed comparison of Gold, Diamond, and Platinum Smart Seller Programs.
- [Properties](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/properties): Active MLS listings in Utah County and surrounding areas.
- [About](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/about): Team background and brokerage information.
- [Blog](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/blog): Local market updates, seller tips, and Utah real estate insights.
- [Resources](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/resources): Guides for buyers and sellers.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/mortgage-calculator): Estimate monthly payments for Utah home purchases.
- [Vendors](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/vendors): Trusted local vendors recommended by the Childs Real Estate team.
- [FAQ](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about buying and selling in Utah.
- [Testimonials](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/testimonials): Client reviews and success stories.
- [Contact](https://www.childsrealestateutah.com/contact): Get in touch with Ammon or Tasha Childs.
